page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program for fast local alignment search, guaranteeing to find epsilon-matches between two sequences. An epsilon-match is a local alignment above a given length with an error rate of at most epsilon.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program for fast local alignment search, guaranteeing to find epsilon-matches between two sequences. An epsilon-match is a local alignment above a given length with an error rate of at most epsilon.
